_comment: Curated list of frameworks/libraries to credit. Only include packages worth mentioning — runtimes, navigation, UI primitives, anything with a visible role. Skip transitive deps and small utility packages. The generator script will pull name/version/license/url from each package's own package.json. Use 'extra' for non-npm credits (fonts, design assets).
intro: This app is built on the work of these open-source projects.
